rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.emptyDesc: Create a private room and share its code with friends — your files distribute to everyone automatically, no cloud in between.
rooms.leaveConfirm: Leave this room? Downloaded files stay on disk, but you will stop syncing with members.
rooms.noFiles: No files shared yet. Add some — they will sync to everyone in the room.
rooms.createDesc: Give your room a name. You will get a code to share with friends.
rooms.joinDesc: Paste the invite code a friend gave you.
rooms.profileDesc: This name and avatar are shown to other members. Your avatar is generated from your identity.
rooms.inviteDesc: Share this code (or QR) with friends. Anyone with it can join.
rooms.openFileHint: Open the file. Sharing of it stops so the file unlocks (others keep their copy).
rooms.watchHint: Play this file in the app (keeps seeding). Turn on "Watch together" to stay in sync with the room.
rooms.playError: Could not play this file on this device.
rooms.together.hint: Sync play / pause / seek with everyone in the room.
rooms.watchAlone: You’re the only one here right now.
rooms.deleteHint: Remove this file from the room for everyone. Downloaded copies are deleted; the original a member shared from is left alone.
rooms.deleteConfirm: Remove this file from the room for everyone? This can’t be undone.
rooms.muteConfirm: Hide this member on your device? Their future shares will be ignored. You can undo this anytime.
rooms.kickConfirm: Remove this member? The room gets a new invite code that everyone else keeps automatically — the removed member can’t rejoin with the old one.
rooms.e2eHint: File contents are encrypted with a room key before sharing, so the swarm only ever carries ciphertext. Uses ~2× disk (encrypted + decrypted copy). Can’t be changed after the room is created.
table.name: Name
catalog.title: Community Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Discover public domain and open source content
create.title: Create New Torrent
create.subtitle: Share your files with the world
create.name: Torrent Name
settings.title: Settings
downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.emptyDesc: Add a magnet link or torrent file to start downloading. You can also use Search to find legal open-source software.
downloads.noMatchDesc: Try selecting a different filter or adding more downloads.
health.title: Health
search.title: Search Torrents
search.hint.title: Configure a search provider first
search.hint.desc: TorrentHunt uses a plugin-based search system. Add a Jackett, Prowlarr, or custom provider to start searching.
search.hint.ready.title: Ready to search
search.hint.ready.desc: Internet Archive is built in — type a query to search public-domain and Creative Commons torrents. Add more providers (Jackett, Prowlarr) for broader results.
search.noResults.title: No results
search.noResults.desc: Try a different query or check your providers.
search.providers.title: Search Providers
search.providers.desc: Add Jackett, Prowlarr (Torznab), or custom JSON API providers. Jackett & Prowlarr are self-hosted — enter your local URL + API key.
search.provider.name: Provider name
search.guide.title: Setup Guide
search.guide.jackett: Download from github.com/Jackett/Jackett, start it, then add http://localhost:9117 with your API key from the Jackett dashboard.
search.guide.prowlarr: Use Torznab type, URL http://localhost:9696, API key from Prowlarr Settings → Security.
search.guide.custom: Any JSON API that accepts ?q={query} and returns { results: [{title, magnetUri, size, seeds, leechers}] }.
search.guide.script: A local Python plugin that prints a JSON array of results. Needs Python 3 installed; the script runs on your machine — only add scripts you trust.
search.python.missing: Python 3 not found. Install it from python.org and re-check.
rss.title: RSS Feeds
rss.empty.title: No RSS feeds
rss.empty.desc: Add an RSS feed to auto-download new torrents.
rss.deleteConfirm: Delete this RSS feed and all its items?
rss.searchEmpty.title: No matching items
rss.searchEmpty.desc: No items match your search. Try a different term.
rss.clearConfirm: Remove the shown items from the list? Feeds and already-downloaded files are not affected — items may reappear on the next feed check.
rss.items.empty.title: No items
rss.items.empty.desc: Check a feed to load items.
rss.form.name: Feed Name *
rss.form.filterHint: Case-insensitive. e.g. S\d+E\d+ for TV episodes
rss.form.autoDlHint: Automatically adds matching items to downloads
settings.sub.downloads: Manage download location, limits and watch folder
settings.sub.network: Download and upload speed, connections, ports
settings.sub.seeding: Control ratio and time limits for all torrents
settings.shareTurn: Use TURN relays for share links
settings.shareTurn.desc: Lets shares connect through strict (symmetric) NAT.
settings.shareTurn.note: On: more reliable across different networks, but the (encrypted) transfer may pass through a third-party relay that sees both IPs. Off: more private (direct only), but won't connect through symmetric NAT.
settings.minTray.desc: Keep app running in system tray when minimized
settings.closeTray.desc: Hide window instead of quitting when closing
settings.maxActive.desc: How many torrents can download simultaneously
settings.watchEnable.desc: Automatically add .torrent files dropped into a folder
settings.watchDelete.desc: Remove the .torrent file after it has been added to the queue
settings.diskGuard.desc: Continuously watch free space on the download drive and pause all torrents before the disk fills up. Resume is manual.
settings.diskMin.desc: Pause everything when free space drops below this value.
settings.speedNote: Speed limiting is best-effort due to WebTorrent limitations
settings.altSpeed.desc: Switch to a second set of limits with one click — from here, the toolbar gauge button, or the tray.
settings.altSpeed.note: Handy as a quick "turbo" (0 = unlimited) or "turtle" (throttle while you work) toggle.
settings.autoMove.desc: When a download finishes, move its files to another folder and keep seeding from there.
settings.webRemote.desc: Control your downloads and watch their files from a phone browser on the same Wi-Fi.
settings.webRemote.scan: Scan this with your phone (same Wi-Fi) to open the remote.
settings.webRemote.noLan: No local network address found — connect to Wi-Fi/LAN and reopen this page.
settings.webRemote.warn: Anyone on your network who has this link can control your downloads. Share it only with your own devices, and tap "New link" to revoke it.
settings.proxyEnable.desc: Route tracker requests through a proxy server
settings.proxyNote: Proxy applies to tracker requests only. Direct peer-to-peer UDP connections bypass the proxy.
settings.dht.desc: Distributed Hash Table for peer discovery
settings.maxConnGlobal.desc: Cap across ALL torrents combined. Lower this if torrents slow down your whole internet or your router/VPN struggles.
settings.port.desc: TCP port for incoming peer connections
settings.portForward.desc: Ask your router to forward the listening port so peers can connect to you — improves speed and peer count, especially on low-seed torrents. Use a fixed port for a stable mapping.
settings.portForward.statusDesc: Live status of the UPnP mapping on your router.
settings.protocols.note: PEX is always on and LSD is not supported by the WebTorrent engine.
settings.advanced.restartNote: DHT, max connections and the listening port are applied on the next app restart.
settings.schedEnable.desc: Downloads will only be active during specified times
settings.noSchedules: No schedules yet. Add your first one!
settings.seedGlobalNote: These apply globally. Per-torrent limits can be set in the download context menu.
settings.seedRatio.desc: Stop seeding when ratio reaches this value (0 = unlimited)
settings.seedTime.desc: Stop seeding after this many minutes (0 = unlimited)
settings.defaultClient.desc: Open .torrent files and magnet links with TorrentHunt
settings.checkUpdatesDesc: Look for new versions on GitHub.
settings.clearCache.desc: Remove temporary files and cached data
settings.appDesc: A desktop torrent client focused on legal open-source software distribution.
settings.msg.defaultFailed: Failed to set as default client
settings.msg.latest: You are on the latest version.
settings.msg.devOnly: Updates only work in the installed app.
settings.msg.devOnly2: Updates are only available in the installed app, not in dev mode.
privacy.title: Privacy & Anonymity
privacy.subtitle: See what the swarm can learn about you — and lock it down.
privacy.restartNote: Applied. This takes effect after the next app restart.
privacy.posture.checkingDesc: Detecting your public IP and VPN status.
privacy.posture.protectedDesc: A VPN is active and the kill-switch is on — peers see the VPN IP, not yours.
privacy.posture.cautionDesc: A VPN is active, but turn on the kill-switch so a VPN drop can’t expose your real IP.
privacy.posture.exposedDesc: No VPN detected — every peer in the swarm can see your real IP address.
privacy.dash.whatPeersSee: This is the IP address other peers in the swarm connect to. With a VPN it should be your VPN’s IP, not your home one.
privacy.leak.isp: This IP appears to belong to a consumer ISP, not a VPN — your real location may be exposed to peers. Connect a VPN before downloading.
privacy.preset.title: Recommended privacy setup
privacy.preset.desc: One click: enable the VPN kill-switch and VPN-on-startup check, sanitize logs, and disable DHT to shrink your exposure.
privacy.preset.applied: Recommended privacy settings applied. DHT change takes effect after restart.
privacy.dht.desc: Finds peers without a tracker. Turning it off makes you harder to discover and queryable by fewer nodes — recommended with private trackers. Takes effect after restart.
privacy.connection.note: Peer connections always announce your IP to the swarm — only a VPN hides it. PEX is always on and LSD isn’t used by the engine.
privacy.vpn.notDetectedDesc: Your real IP address may be visible to peers. Consider using a VPN for better privacy.
privacy.vpn.unknownDesc: Unable to determine VPN status. Click to check manually.
privacy.enc.unavailableDesc: Your system doesn't support secure encryption. Data will be obfuscated but not fully encrypted.
privacy.ephemeralId.desc: The BitTorrent peer ID is randomized every launch (no machine-identifying data), so peers can't correlate your sessions over time.
privacy.vpnDetection.desc: Show a warning on startup if no VPN is detected. A VPN is the only way to actually hide your IP from peers.
privacy.killSwitch.desc: Continuously monitor the VPN and automatically pause all torrents if it drops, so your real IP is never exposed. Resume is manual.
privacy.encSecrets.desc: Proxy password and search-provider API keys are encrypted at rest using OS-level encryption (Keychain / DPAPI / libsecret).
privacy.clearOnExit.desc: Automatically delete logs and temporary data when closing the app.
privacy.sanitizeLogs.desc: Remove or hash sensitive data (IPs, IDs) in log files.
privacy.disableLogs.desc: Completely disable file logging. ⚠️ Makes debugging difficult.
privacy.clearAll.desc: Permanently delete all data including reputation, downloads, and settings. This action cannot be undone!
privacy.tips.title: Privacy Tips
privacy.tips.vpnText: It is the only thing here that actually hides your real IP from peers.
privacy.tips.killSwitchText: It auto-pauses torrents if your VPN drops, so a brief outage can’t leak your IP.
privacy.tips.dhtText: It reduces who can discover you; many private trackers require it off.
privacy.tips.privateText: Enable the "Private torrent" option when creating torrents to keep them off DHT/PEX.
privacy.tips.checkText: Use the dashboard above (or ipleak.net) to confirm your VPN IP is what peers see.
privacy.confirm1:
⚠️ This will permanently delete all your data including:

• All downloads and torrents
• Reputation and transactions
• Categories and settings
• All logs and temporary files

This action CANNOT be undone!

Are you absolutely sure?
privacy.confirm2:
⚠️ FINAL WARNING!

You are about to delete ALL DATA.
Type YES in your mind and click OK to proceed.
privacy.cleared:
✅ All data cleared successfully!

The application will reload.
privacy.clearFailed: ❌ Failed to clear data. Check console for details.
seeding.networkSubtitle: Earn points by seeding rare torrents and help the community
seeding.disabledBanner: Enable the network to start earning points by seeding rare torrents. Your stats below are preserved while it's off.
seeding.soonText: Points, levels and recommendations work locally today. Sharing reputation and seeder discovery across the P2P network is in development.
seeding.recommendedSubtitle: These torrents will earn you the most points
seeding.emptyRecs: Complete torrent downloads to get recommendations
player.transcodingNote: Converting on the fly (ffmpeg) — seeking ahead may be limited.
player.noMedia: No playable video or audio files in this torrent.
player.unsupported: This file couldn't be played even after conversion. Try an external player.
player.note: Streaming from the torrent — playback starts before the download finishes.
player.castDesc: Scan with a phone, tablet or TV on the same Wi-Fi.
player.castHint: The device must be on the same network. Unplayable formats are converted on the fly, so seeking works.
player.castNoLan: No local network address found — connect to Wi-Fi or a LAN and try again.
player.castRemoteDesc: Open on any device, on any network — even mobile data.
player.castRemoteHint: Streams over the Internet (P2P). Keep this window open while they watch; seeking is limited.
player.castTvSearching: Searching for TVs on your network…
player.castTvHint: Works with Chromecast / Android TV on the same Wi-Fi. Keep this window open while it plays.
player.subNone: No subtitles found in this file or folder
share.title: Share link
share.notComplete: The download must be complete before you can share it.
share.linkLabel: Anyone with this link can download in their browser:
share.note: Keep TorrentHunt open while people download. The transfer is peer-to-peer (WebRTC) — nothing is uploaded to a server.
share.qrHint: Scan to open the link on a phone
trackers.emptyHint: Add a tracker URL above or wait for the torrent to connect.
